en: "I have made a covenant with my eyes; how then could I gaze at a virgin?
zh: “我與自己的眼睛立了約， 決不注視處女。

en: What would be my portion from God above and my heritage from the Almighty on high?
zh: 從至上的 神所得的分， 從至高的全能者所得的業是甚麼呢？

en: Is not calamity for the unrighteous, and disaster for the workers of iniquity?
zh: 災難不是臨到不義的人嗎？ 災禍不是臨到作孽的人嗎？

en: Does not he see my ways and number all my steps?
zh: 神不是察看我的道路， 數算我的一切腳步嗎？

en: "If I have walked with falsehood and my foot has hastened to deceit;
zh: 我若與虛謊同行， 我的腳若急於追隨詭詐，

en: (Let me be weighed in a just balance, and let God know my integrity!)
zh: 就願我被公平的天平稱度， 使 神可以知道我的完全。

en: if my step has turned aside from the way and my heart has gone after my eyes, and if any spot has stuck to my hands,
zh: 我的腳步若偏離正道， 我的心若隨從眼目而行， 我的手掌若黏有任何污點，

en: then let me sow, and another eat, and let what grows for me be rooted out.
zh: 就願我所種的，讓別人來吃， 願我田中出產的，都連根拔起來。

en: "If my heart has been enticed toward a woman, and I have lain in wait at my neighbor's door,
zh: 我的心若被女人迷惑， 在別人的門口埋伏，

en: then let my wife grind for another, and let others bow down on her.
zh: 就願我的妻子作別人的奴僕， 也願別人屈身與她行淫，

en: For that would be a heinous crime; that would be an iniquity to be punished by the judges;
zh: 因為這是大惡，是該受審判的罪孽；

en: for that would be a fire that consumes as far as Abaddon, and it would burn to the root all my increase.
zh: 這是焚燒直至毀滅的火， 必把我所有的收穫都拔出來。

en: "If I have rejected the cause of my manservant or my maidservant, when they brought a complaint against me,
zh: 我的僕婢與我爭論的時候， 我若輕視他們的案件，

en: what then shall I do when God rises up? When he makes inquiry, what shall I answer him?
zh: 神若起來，我怎麼辦呢？ 他若鑒察，我怎樣回答呢？

en: Did not he who made me in the womb make him? And did not one fashion us in the womb?
zh: 那造我在母腹中的，不也造他嗎？ 造我們在母胎裡的，不是同一位嗎？

en: "If I have withheld anything that the poor desired, or have caused the eyes of the widow to fail,
zh: 我若不給窮人所要的， 或使寡婦的眼所期待的落空；

en: or have eaten my morsel alone, and the fatherless has not eaten of it
zh: 我若獨吃我的一點食物， 孤兒卻沒有與我同吃；

en: (for from my youth the fatherless grew up with me as with a father, and from my mother's womb I guided the widow),
zh: 自我幼年時，孤兒與我一同長大， 以我為父， 從我出母腹以來，我就善待寡婦。

en: if I have seen anyone perish for lack of clothing, or the needy without covering,
zh: 我若見人因無衣服死亡， 或貧窮人毫無遮蓋；

en: if his body has not blessed me, and if he was not warmed with the fleece of my sheep,
zh: 他若不因我的羊毛得溫暖， 他的心若不向我道謝；

en: if I have raised my hand against the fatherless, because I saw my help in the gate,
zh: 我若在城門見有支持我的， 就揮手攻擊孤兒，

en: then let my shoulder blade fall from my shoulder, and let my arm be broken from its socket.
zh: 就願我的肩頭從肩胛脫落， 願我的前臂從上臂折斷；

en: For I was in terror of calamity from God, and I could not have faced his majesty.
zh: 因為 神所降的災難使我恐懼， 因他的崇高我不敢妄為。

en: "If I have made gold my trust or called fine gold my confidence,
zh: 我若以黃金為我所信靠的， 又對精金說：‘你是我所靠賴的’；

en: if I have rejoiced because my wealth was abundant or because my hand had found much,
zh: 我若因為財物豐裕， 或因為我多獲財利而歡喜；

en: if I have looked at the sun when it shone, or the moon moving in splendor,
zh: 我若見太陽 照耀， 或明月行在空中，

en: and my heart has been secretly enticed, and my mouth has kissed my hand,
zh: 以致心中暗暗地受到迷惑， 用自己的嘴親手；

en: this also would be an iniquity to be punished by the judges, for I would have been false to God above.
zh: 那麼這也就是該受審判的罪孽， 因為我欺哄了高高在上的 神。

en: "If I have rejoiced at the ruin of him who hated me, or exulted when evil overtook him
zh: 我若因恨我的人遭災禍而歡喜， 或因他遇患難而高興；

en: (I have not let my mouth sin by asking for his life with a curse),
zh: 我並沒有容許我的口犯罪， 咒詛他的性命。

en: if the men of my tent have not said, 'Who is there that has not been filled with his meat?'
zh: 我家裡的人若沒有說： ‘誰能找出哪一個沒有飽吃他的肉食的呢？’

en: (the sojourner has not lodged in the street; I have opened my doors to the traveler),
zh: 旅客沒有在街上過夜， 我的門向過路的人是敞開的。

en: if I have concealed my transgressions as others do by hiding my iniquity in my bosom,
zh: 我若像亞當遮掩我的過犯， 把我的罪孽藏在懷中，

en: because I stood in great fear of the multitude, and the contempt of families terrified me, so that I kept silence, and did not go out of doors-
zh: 因為我懼怕群眾， 宗族的藐視又使我驚恐， 以致我靜默不言，足不出門。

en: Oh, that I had one to hear me! (Here is my signature! Let the Almighty answer me!) Oh, that I had the indictment written by my adversary!
zh: 但願有一位肯聽我的， 看哪！這是我所劃的押， 願全能者回答我， 願那與我爭訟的寫好狀詞。

en: Surely I would carry it on my shoulder; I would bind it on me as a crown;
zh: 我定要把它帶到我的肩上， 綁在我的頭上為冠冕。

en: I would give him an account of all my steps; like a prince I would approach him.
zh: 我要向他述說全部的行為， 又像王子一般進到他面前。

en: "If my land has cried out against me and its furrows have wept together,
zh: 我的田地若呼冤控告我， 地的犁溝若都一同哀哭；

en: if I have eaten its yield without payment and made its owners breathe their last,
zh: 我若吃地裡的出產而不給價銀， 或使地主氣絕身亡，

en: let thorns grow instead of wheat, and foul weeds instead of barley." The words of Job are ended.
zh: 就願蒺藜長出來代替小麥， 臭草代替大麥。” 約伯的話說完了。
